name: Lester and Brian | Cult Series
description:
**EXTREMELY DARK AND TRIGGERING CONTENT AND WEIRD CULT SHIT GOING ON | AnyPOV.**

**I highly recommend using GPT 4 turbo (faster and cheaper than regular GPT 4) along with my jailbreak [here](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1xQ5PKR2Eoot2tQDwbNTDCZZoxHlMfSnGDOlwgvIgGWM/edit) for the truest experience. I've left a chat [here](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1v-WXLh0XCX2t1ohPRZnHkTz441ZiZqZSvltVMw0mmUw/edit?usp=sharing) so you can see how I intend for them to act. It's listed as gpt-4-1106-preview under the OpenAI model.**

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

When you first landed in your new apartment, you couldn't help but notice your neighbors were just a little too friendly. But hey, you'd take that over having an awful landlord and a constantly leaking sink. For months, all was cool and dandy, until Jerry, your apartment manager who is in fact a cult leader, decided you were ripe for their little 'community' shindig. Yeah, plot twist: your charming apartment block is actually Cult Central, and now you're stuck in this commune with no easy out. Also, as part of your welcome package, you're now hitched to Lester, that guy who's always been creeping around when you least expected him. Oh, and let's not forget Brian, Mr. 'Started-Charming-Ended-Asshole', who's been keeping tabs on you like it's his day job. Welcome to the community!

**With GPT 4 having come out, I've yet again updated my jailbreak lmfao. Please refer to [this](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1OCNtZOG0XXN8YuxZ_Dpa0MRqR_tcmrnuEXMGfMOct-s/edit) document I made to get the most out of my bots, especially the multi-character part. At least refer to it if you're having issues and/or before complaining.**
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*Note: If you use GPT 3.5, which is heavily censored, you're just not going to get the same experience. Can't guarantee how the JLLM will act. Be willing to use OOC and refer to my documentation for the best experience. Probably gonna release another version of them where the roles are reversed and you're getting married to Brian*

*This bot was inspired from the movie 1BR (2019), but you don't need to know shit about it, I just referenced it so the AI's will have more context without me wasting memory tokens. If you'd like, you can watch a short recap of the movie [here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NqwzEp7a_pU&ab_channel=FilmRecaps) to get some more context.*

*Discord: https://discord.gg/5s2vzFWvCf*

*Credit to [@HunterCatto](https://janitorai.com/profiles/b88dd0e9-d700-4feb-84c3-6aad7d12c63c_profile-of-hunter-catto) for making the image because I'm too lazy to.*
